message:
feat(codec): wire codec abstraction headers into umbrella include and hooks

Integrate the new codec subsystem into the build:
- Add #include <asx/codec/schema.h> and <asx/codec/codec.h> to the
  umbrella header asx.h so downstream consumers get codec types
  automatically
- Add codec.h include to hooks.c for codec-aware hook dispatch
- Add new header files: codec.h (codec abstraction API) and
  schema.h (canonical fixture schema types)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
